case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR VS. YANN GIGUET

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.99) SERVED OCT-18-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GIGUET, YANN

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GIGUET, YANN $4,345.39 PRINCIPAL, $2,174.48 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,519.87

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-09-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-09-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY YOLANDA ARENAS--CCSF/SR. COLLECTION OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $2,174.48 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT GIGUET, YANN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-09-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GIGUET, YANN $4,294.40 PRINCIPAL, $50.99 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,345.39 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
